answers.where: Yellow Backrooms corridor facing a larger-inside impossible-room aperture with physical native trim, clearer warm bounce on nearby wall/floor material, copied mark, and dark interior backing
answers.action: Use the copied mark as evidence, find the missing handle, and test the locked door
answers.response: The portal area now has additional warm bounce/fill and a light color-clarity pass so the wall, floor, and aperture materials read less muddy
answers.reward: The player learns the room can be tested and later stabilized by fitting the found handle
answers.game_look: Native 3D liminal horror view with a larger-inside portal room, generated Backrooms materials, physical aperture trim, warmer local light bounce, shadowed interior, minimal journal UI, and visible native wall/floor/ceiling surfaces

issues.text: The portal area is clearer and less muddy, but it still lacks production-grade authored geometry, crisp material detail, and physically convincing integrated light/shadow.
The impossible-space hook remains readable, but the visual signature is still not strong enough to stand apart from high-quality Backrooms games.

problem: The material/light clarity improved around the portal, but the result still reads as a hybrid matte/composite plus native overlay rather than a production-quality native room or render-target portal.
next: Continue toward a complete opaque native portal-room draw path or unblock T0011 render-target-backed portal lighting; avoid expanding gameplay content while art_quality and audience_fit remain 3.
